chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Criminal Transfer Application No.D-01/2024 (New) Criminal Transfer Application No.D-77/2024 (old) DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 13.05.2025 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh. Mr. Abdul Rehman A. Bhutto, advocate holds brief for Mr. Saeed Ahmed B. Bijarani, counsel for the Respondents. ------ At the very outset, learned counsel for the applicant under the instructions does not wish to press instant Criminal Transfer Application for the time being, which is not opposed by the other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
